title: Lamb Burger with Australian Flair
description: A flavorful lamb burger infused with the essence of Australia, featuring a garlicky and fiery kick. Perfect for a unique dinner experience.

ingredients.name: Fiery slaw
ingredients.notes: Made with red cabbage, carrot, and a drizzle of chili oil

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Form the lamb patty and season with salt, pepper, and Australian bush herbs.
Grill the lamb patty for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, toast the burger buns on the grill or in a toaster.
Spread a layer of garlicky aioli on the bottom bun.
Add a few slices of red onion, a lettuce leaf, and a tomato slice on top of the aioli.
Place the grilled lamb patty on top of the vegetables.
Add a dollop of Australian bush tomato chutney on top of the lamb patty.
Drizzle the fiery slaw over the chutney.
